source.format_note: ACT redesigned 2025-2026: all sections now 4-option A-D/F-J (was 4-opt for E/R/S + 5-opt for Math previously)

vocabulary_cues: Which choice makes the sentence most grammatically acceptable
Which choice most effectively maintains the essay's tone
Which choice is least redundant in context

CONVENTIONS_OF_STANDARD_ENGLISH: concord/agreement (pronoun reference, case shift, subject-verb, verb tense)

sample_stems: Which choice makes the sentence most grammatically acceptable? A. No Change B. Years ago, C. When D. Delete the underlined portion.
Which choice most effectively maintains the essay's tone?
Given that all the choices are accurate, which one provides the best transition from the preceding paragraph to this paragraph?
Which choice is least redundant in context?
